description:
CCleaner for PC helps you clean up your Windows computer, optimize performance, and maintain your online privacy.

Inject instant speed into your machine by freezing resource-hogging apps and programs and by removing the unnecessary files taking up room on your hard drive. Clear out errors, broken settings, and update drivers to improve stability. Protect your privacy by securely erasing tracking cookies and history.
Expanding our cleaning
- Clipboard cleaning is back. We've re-implemented clipboard cleaning so CCleaner can clear your copied content again, just like it did before.
Helping you to keep your PC running fast and smooth
- Run dialog history now cleaned on Windows 11. CCleaner once again clears your Run dialog history on Windows 11.
Taking the hassle out of PC maintenance
- System tray icon now shows reliably. We fixed an issue where the CCleaner icon wouldn't appear in your system tray even when the option was enabled.
- Smoother first-time setup. New users no longer see overlapping onboarding screens during installation.
Enhancing our Software Updater
- Windows Update detection on ARM64 devices. Software Updater now correctly detects Windows Update patches on ARM64 PCs.
- Improved connectivity on older Windows. Driver Updater now connects reliably on Windows 7 and Windows 8 devices.
Simplifying the app
- Refreshed Settings layout. The General tab now has clearer section dividers, updated headings, and a new Reset button in Advanced Settings.
- Consistent date format. Dates across Driver Updater, Disk Analyzer, and Performance Optimizer now display in a clearer format.
Keeping you safe
- Accept button always reachable. We added scrollbar support so the Accept button is accessible at any Windows display scaling level.
Fixing bugs
- Fixed the three-dots menu overflowing into the table header in Startup Manager.
- Fixed text clipping in the Uninstaller column header for Russian users.
- Fixed column misalignment on the Health Check "Resolve Issues" page.
- Fixed untidy subscription list layout in Settings for RTL languages.
- Fixed checkbox labels in Disk Analyzer so clicking the label now toggles the checkbox.
- Fixed inconsistent icon alignment in Statistics view tiles for RTL languages.
- Fixed missing row indentation in the Driver Updater up-to-date list.
- Fixed Statistics page misalignment in German, French, Czech, and Danish.
- Fixed overlapping modals when skipping a driver in Driver Updater.
